test_cases.title: Single mode shows duration in collapsed view
test_cases.description: Execute a single-mode subagent task and verify the collapsed output includes duration (e.g., '3.2s') after the agent name
steps: Invoke subagent with agent='general-purpose', task='read README.md', taskComplexity='low'
Wait for completion
Check collapsed output contains duration string (e.g., '3.2s' or '234ms')
Press Ctrl+O to expand
Check expanded view header contains duration

test_cases.title: Parallel collapsed shows table format
test_cases.description: Parallel execution collapsed view should show one line per agent with status/duration/turns/tokens/cost, no tool call details
steps: Invoke subagent in parallel mode with 3 tasks using different agents or same agent with different tasks
Observe TUI during execution: running agents show elapsed + last @ HH:MM:SS
After completion, verify each agent occupies one line
Verify Total line shows aggregate tokens and cost
Verify no tool call details visible in collapsed view
Verify '(Ctrl+O to expand)' hint shown

test_cases.title: Parallel expanded shows full detail per agent
test_cases.description: Expanded parallel view shows task description, tool calls, final output, usage, duration for each agent
steps: Invoke subagent in parallel mode with 2 tasks
After completion, press Ctrl+O to expand
Verify each agent section has: task description, tool call list, final output markdown, usage stats, duration in header

test_cases.title: Streaming throttle limits update frequency
test_cases.description: Parallel mode streaming should not update TUI more than once per 500ms
steps: Invoke subagent in parallel mode with 3 tasks (include one that takes >5s)
Observe TUI update frequency during execution
Verify no flickering or excessive redraws (visual check: updates ~2x/sec max)
Verify final state appears immediately when all agents complete

test_cases.title: Partial parallel failure returns isError=true
test_cases.description: When at least one parallel task fails, the tool result has isError=true
steps: Invoke subagent in parallel mode with 2 tasks: one valid, one with non-existent agent name
Verify result isError is true
Verify output shows agent status icons (success and failure)
Verify failed agent shows error message

test_cases.title: Tool description includes parallel error guidance
test_cases.description: The subagent tool description should contain IMPORTANT guidance about isError semantics in parallel mode
steps: Check the tool description text visible to the LLM
Verify it contains 'IMPORTANT for parallel mode: isError=true means at least one task failed'
Verify it contains guidance to check individual agent status

test_cases.title: getFinalOutput finds text from earlier assistant messages
test_cases.description: When the last assistant message has only tool_use, getFinalOutput should return text from earlier messages
steps: Execute a task that triggers multiple assistant turns ending with a tool call
Verify the final output is non-empty and contains meaningful text
Verify no empty '(no output)' when earlier messages had text

test_cases.title: Temp files use fixed directory
test_cases.description: Temp prompt files are written to os.tmpdir()/pi-subagent/ with UUID filenames
steps: Check that no new pi-subagent-* random directories are created in os.tmpdir()
Verify files appear in os.tmpdir()/pi-subagent/ during execution
Verify files are cleaned up after subagent completes

test_cases.title: Old temp files are cleaned up
test_cases.description: Files older than 1 hour in pi-subagent/ are deleted on next execution
steps: Create a test file in os.tmpdir()/pi-subagent/ with mtime > 1 hour ago: touch -t 202501010000 /tmp/pi-subagent/test-stale.md
Execute any subagent command
Verify the stale file was deleted
Verify recently created files were NOT deleted

test_cases.title: Chain mode shows per-step duration
test_cases.description: Chain mode collapsed and expanded views show duration for each step
steps: Invoke subagent in chain mode with 2 steps
After completion, verify collapsed view shows duration per step
Expand view and verify each step header shows duration
Verify total duration shown in chain header

test_cases.title: Single mode behavior unchanged except duration
test_cases.description: Single mode collapsed view still shows tool calls, only adds duration to output
steps: Invoke subagent in single mode
Verify collapsed view shows tool call details (same as before)
Verify duration is added to the output line
Expand and verify same structure as before plus duration in header

test_cases.title: Chain mode behavior unchanged except duration
test_cases.description: Chain mode collapsed view still shows tool calls per step, only adds duration
steps: Invoke subagent in chain mode
Verify collapsed view shows tool calls per step (same as before)
Verify duration is added per step
Expand and verify same structure plus duration
